display.purpose: Hero title, manifesto phrases, section headings. Always italic for brand warmth.

headline.purpose: Event titles and guest names in program rows. Faustina 800 UPPERCASE. Poster scale, not editorial.

title.purpose: Sub-headings, town names on mobile territory list, section intro phrases. Bugaki italic.

body.purpose: All paragraph text, festival descriptions. DM Sans 300, max 65–75ch per line.

label.purpose: Section eyebrow lines. DM Sans 500, 0.6rem, 0.24em tracking, uppercase. Preceded by 1.25rem horizontal rule.

shadows.name: nav-scroll
shadows.purpose: Navigation border on scroll. The only shadow-adjacent effect in the system. Appears with backdrop-filter: blur(16px) and 0.95 opacity paper background.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for UI state changes: hover, nav scroll, button transitions. Duration: 0.28–0.4s.

motion.name: ease-out-enter
motion.purpose: Scroll-triggered fade-up entrances. Base .fade-up class. Duration: 0.7s.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Hero entrance sequence and thread draw-on animations. Confident, decisive deceleration. Duration: 0.65s–2.5s depending on context.

breakpoints.name: nav
breakpoints.purpose: Navigation switches from desktop links to hamburger.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.purpose: Program row collapses time column; about-strip goes single column.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.purpose: Territory map hidden, hero vtext hidden, program row single-column, town names go large.

breakpoints.name: xs
breakpoints.purpose: Hero title line breaks removed, newsletter form stacks vertically.

components.name: Label (Eyebrow)
components.description: Section eyebrow with leading horizontal rule. Rosa on paper; adapted for teal/ink surfaces.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.24em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.58 0.20 0); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.65rem; } .ds-label::before { content: ''; display: block; width: 1.25rem; height: 1px; background: oklch(0.58 0.20 0); flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Button Primary (btn-rosa)
components.description: Primary CTA. Rosa fill, paper text. Zero radius. Used for hero and newsletter CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.6rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; background: oklch(0.58 0.20 0); color: oklch(0.96 0.008 60); border: 1px solid oklch(0.58 0.20 0); border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), border-color 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.20 0); border-color: oklch(0.52 0.20 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.58 0.20 0); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Button Wine
components.description: Secondary CTA on paper surfaces. Transparent with wine border; fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-wine { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.33 0.10 10); border: 1px solid oklch(0.33 0.10 10); border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), color 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-btn-wine:hover { background: oklch(0.33 0.10 10); color: oklch(0.96 0.008 60); } .ds-btn-wine:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.33 0.10 10); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Button Light
components.description: CTA for dark (ink) section backgrounds. Ghost with near-white border; fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-light { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.875rem 1.75rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.97 0.005 195); border: 1px solid oklch(0.97 0.005 195 / 0.35); border-radius: 0; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: background 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), color 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94), border-color 0.32s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-btn-light:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0.005 195); color: oklch(0.14 0.015 195); border-color: oklch(0.97 0.005 195); } .ds-btn-light:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.97 0.005 195); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Desktop navigation link. Underline grows from 0 on hover/active. Inverts to near-white on dark hero pages.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.63rem; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.14 0.015 195); position: relative; padding-bottom: 3px; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; width: 0; height: 1px; background: oklch(0.58 0.20 0); transition: width 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-nav-link:hover::after, .ds-nav-link.active::after { width: 100%; } .ds-nav-link:hover, .ds-nav-link.active { color: oklch(0.58 0.20 0); }

components.name: Thread Divider
components.description: Curly SVG thread line. wine color, draws itself on scroll via stroke-dashoffset animation. Horizontal divider variant.
components.css: .ds-thread-rule { width: 100%; height: 28px; } .ds-thread-rule svg { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; } .thread-path { stroke-dasharray: 9999; stroke-dashoffset: 9999; }

components.name: Program Row
components.description: Editorial event list row. Three-column grid: date | content | time. Faustina 800 UPPERCASE for title and guest. Hover paper-warm.
components.html:
7 lugSan Miniato

La lingua come patria

Chiara Tagliaferri

Loggiati San Domenico

21:00
components.css: .ds-program-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 9.5rem 1fr 4rem; gap: 0 2.5rem; padding: 1.65rem 0; align-items: start; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.86 0.018 195); text-decoration: none; color: inherit; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94); } .ds-program-row:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0.012 65); } .ds-prog-left { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.3rem; padding-top: 0.2rem; } .ds-prog-day { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.58 0.20 0); } .ds-prog-place { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.56rem; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.28 0.018 195); } .ds-prog-title { font-family: 'Faustina', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(0.85rem, 1.4vw, 1.1rem); font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; line-height: 1.18; color: oklch(0.33 0.10 10); margin-bottom: 0.4rem; } .ds-prog-guest { font-family: 'Faustina', Georgia, serif; font-size: 0.82rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: oklch(0.28 0.018 195); } .ds-prog-venue { margin-top: 0.35rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: oklch(0.28 0.018 195); } .ds-prog-time { font-family: 'DM Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.62rem; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: oklch(0.75 0.012 195); text-align: right; padding-top: 0.2rem; white-space: nowrap; }

narrative.overview:
The festival thread is not decoration: it IS the identity. Every SVG thread path drawn on scroll is the brand making itself visible in real time, materializing on the screen the way a festival materializes in a place. The thread animates from nothing as you arrive at each section, tracing the same line that connects the four Tuscan towns on the sketched territory map.

This is a festival that takes positions. Color is used with commitment: the mineral teal and deep wine dominate full-bleed sections. The muted magenta (the logo's inherited warmth) appears on labels and CTAs. Every tint pulls toward a brand hue; pure gray is prohibited. The palette references Italian mineral pigments, Tuscan terra cotta, and the warm grain of handmade paper.

Motion is choreographed once per section, then silent. Thread SVG paths draw themselves via stroke-dashoffset transition. Town dots on the territory map materialize in staggered sequence as the thread passes through them. One well-rehearsed entrance per section; no scattered micro-interactions.
keyCharacteristics: Full-bleed teal and ink sections span the viewport edge, never boxed
SVG curly thread paths drawn on scroll entry are the visual signature
Zero border-radius throughout: sharp corners read as intentional, handmade
Organic wave clip-paths on photos instead of rectangular frames
Faustina 800 UPPERCASE for guest names and event titles: poster weight
Botanical silhouette SVG floats on a 13s ambient loop on teal sections
prefers-reduced-motion disables all entrance animations immediately

rules.name: The No-Neutral-Gray Rule
rules.body: Every tint must pull toward a brand hue (chroma >= 0.008 in OKLCH). Pure grays are prohibited.

rules.name: The Rosa Reserve Rule
rules.body: Rosa appears on <=15% of any screen surface, always at label scale or as a filled button. Overuse kills the warmth.

rules.name: The Three-Voice Rule
rules.body: Bugaki owns brand moments (headings, manifesto, hero). Faustina owns event impact (titles, guest names). DM Sans owns everything else. Never cross the streams.

rules.name: The Italic Doctrine
rules.body: Bugaki italic is the brand's emotional register. Section headings lean italic. 'd'identità' in the logotype is always italic.

rules.name: The Single Elevation Exception
rules.body: The only blur in the system is the nav scroll backdrop-filter: blur(16px). Functional, not decorative. No other shadows or blurs.

rules.name: The Flat Field Rule
rules.body: If you reach for box-shadow, stop. Replace with a full border or background tint.

dos: Do use full-bleed teal and ink section backgrounds spanning 100% viewport width
Do animate thread SVG paths with stroke-dashoffset on scroll entry
Do use the wave clip-path on every featured photo
Do use Faustina 800 UPPERCASE for all event titles and guest names
Do tint every neutral toward the brand hue (chroma >= 0.008)
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: skip all entrance animations
Do use the Label component as the eyebrow for every section
Do keep all buttons zero border-radius and full-border on all four sides
Do use cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) for hero entrances and thread draw-on
Do use the botanical silhouette SVG on teal sections with the ambient float loop
donts: Don't use generic festival or ticketing aesthetics: no Eventbrite-style card grids
Don't introduce corporate coldness: neutral gray palettes, detached tone
Don't apply overdesigned startup pitch deck cleanliness
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient
Don't use identical card grids for event listings
Don't mix the three font roles
Don't add border-radius to buttons, inputs, or any rectangular container
Don't place --rosa on body copy at small sizes
Don't use bounce or elastic easing anywhere
